visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit indoor office space where a woman in a black t-shirt is writing on a notepad while the main character, a woman in a white sweater with a large red poppy design, looks on with a concerned expression. Behind them is a large blue and white Vegeta statue and shelves filled with various anime figurines and toys. (2) The scene cuts to the main character sitting at a wooden desk with a laptop, reacting with wide eyes and shock as she talks to the camera; text overlays appear to emphasize her words. (3) A series of flashback-style scenes follow, shown with a hazy, high-exposure filter, where the main character is seen at a party holding a glass, appearing intoxicated and shouting enthusiastically at others. (4) Returning to the present, a colleague in a green sweater shows the main character a banking app on a smartphone, leading to further comedic distress. (5) Detailed product shots appear: a bottle of 'Pure Raw Honey' is squeezed into a glass of water, followed by a demonstration of 'Botanic Cleansing Gel' being applied to the main character's face while she lies on a sofa. (6) Three distinct capsules—yellow, black, and white—are held up individually against the camera, followed by the characters taking them with water. (7) The video ends with a group shot of the three women laughing and talking together in the office setting.

(5) [Subtitle]: 加薪???. (6) [Subtitle]: 我真的不能沒有你. (7) [Slogan]: 蜜理純生封蓋蜜. (8) [Slogan]: Mi淨 麥盧卡藍銅植萃洗卸凝膠. (9) [Slogan]: Mi酒 閃酒膠囊??. (10) [Subtitle]: 黃色膠囊 加速酒精代謝. [Subtitle]: 黑色膠囊 補充能量. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (female), 2 colleagues/friends appearing in different scenes
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with brown-tinted hair and bangs, wearing a white sweater with a prominent red flower graphic and colorful hair clips.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An office or hobby room filled with anime collectibles, a large Dragon Ball statue, and office furniture; later scenes show a living room sofa and a simple studio-like background for product demos.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-pitched, excited female voices in Traditional Chinese, expressing panic and shock about a previous night's events. The background features a bouncy, upbeat comedic BGM. A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition to a flashback. (2) In the flashback, vocal arousal increases as the main character is heard shouting 'One ten thousand!' with a slight echo effect. The background music maintains its steady, high-energy rhythm. (3) Transitioning back to the present, a 'pop' SFX accompanies the appearance of graphics, while the speaker's tone becomes more explanatory but remains fast-paced. (4) During the product demonstration, the sound of liquid pouring into a glass and a spoon clinking is prominently mixed over the BGM. (5) A series of 'ding' sounds mark the presentation of three different colored capsules, each followed by a short, descriptive narrative phrase. (6) The video concludes with the voices of all three women laughing together, ending with a hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Flashback Conflict -> Solution/Product Presentation -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a comedic 'hangover regret' scenario to promote a suite of health and beauty products, specifically honey, a facial cleanser, and anti-alcohol capsules, showing how they help the creator recover from the previous night's social excesses.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of product usage, on-screen brand names, and slogans praising product benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy promotional content utilizing social media editing tropes like fast cuts and variety-show text to maintain engagement.
